title: Introducing Claude Science (now in beta)
summary: Claude Science is a research app in public beta from Anthropic that performs analyses, searches scientific databases, and traces reproducible workflows. It ships with code, environment details, and conversation history for reproducibility and runs on laptops, clusters, or on-demand GPUs with pre-configured support for genomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics.
writeup: Anthropic introduces Claude Science, a research app in public beta that runs analyses, searches scientific databases, and traces reproducible workflows. Each run ships with code, environment details, and conversation history, and the app operates on laptops, clusters, or on-demand GPUs with pre-configured support for genomics, structural biology, and cheminformatics. The emphasis on packaging code and environment alongside results targets reproducibility in scientific computing.
